home.title: Homepage
home.description: Nimara is a flexible headless storefront built on Saleor. Quick to deploy, easy to integrate, with an intuitive UI for management and customization.

search.description: Find products fast on Nimara — a headless storefront powered by Saleor with smart search and filtering.

common.product-added: Product has been added to your bag.
common.toast-something-wrong: Something went wrong. Please try again.
common.toast-no-response: No response from server. Please try again.
common.name: Name

cart.discount-removed: Your discount code has been removed
cart.max-quantity: Sorry, the maximum quantity you can order is {maxQuantity}.
cart.vendor-restriction-description: You can only add products from the same vendor in a single order. Products without a vendor cannot be mixed with vendor products in the same order. This product was not added to cart.
cart.vendor-restriction-temporary: This is a temporary limitation - buying from multiple vendors will be available soon.

errors.INSUFFICIENT_STOCK: One or more products in your bag are currently out of stock. Please reduce the quantity or remove them from your bag.
errors.VARIANT_NOT_AVAILABLE: One or more products in your bag are not available anymore. Please remove them from your bag.

site.check-out-our-store: Check out our store and find something that suits you best.

products.check-out-the-product: Check out the {productName} in our offer.

address.sorry-you-dont-have-any-addresses: Sorry, you don't have any addresses yet.
address.delete-address-description: Are you sure you want to delete this address? You won't be able to undo this action.

payment.title: Payment
payment.no-payment-methods: Sorry, you don’t have any payment methods yet.

order-confirmation.heading: Your order has been successfully placed
order-confirmation.paragraph:
We are glad to take care of your order!

Check your inbox to find the receipt and further instructions.

form-validation.email-required: Email is required to create an account.
form-validation.min-length-password: Password should contain at least {minimum} signs.
form-validation.reset-password-required-email: Type the email to reset the password.

checkout-errors.QUANTITY_GREATER_THAN_LIMIT: Sorry, the maximum quantity you can order has been reached.

errors.BAD_REQUEST_ERROR: Bad request. Please check your input.
errors.CART_LINES_ADD_ERROR: Failed to add lines to the cart.
errors.CART_LINES_DELETE_ERROR: Failed to delete lines from the cart.
errors.CART_LINES_UPDATE_ERROR: Failed to update lines in the cart.
errors.CHECKOUT_CUSTOMER_ATTACH_ERROR: Failed to attach customer to checkout.
errors.CHECKOUT_GATEWAY_CUSTOMER_GET_ERROR: Failed to get customer from checkout.
errors.DEFAULT_PAYMENT_ERROR: Failed to collect the payment. Please try again.
errors.DISCOUNT_CODE_REMOVE_ERROR: Sorry, we couldn’t remove your discount code. Please try again.
errors.GENERIC_CARD_ERROR: There was an error with your card.
errors.GENERIC_PAYMENT_ERROR: Something went wrong with the payment. Please try again or <link>contact with us</link>.
errors.INVALID_RESPONSE_ERROR: Received an invalid response from the server.
errors.INVALID_JSON_ERROR: Received invalid data from the server.
errors.JWT_INVALID_TOKEN_ERROR: Your session has expired or is invalid. Please log in again.
errors.JWT_SIGNATURE_EXPIRED_ERROR: Too much time has passed to change your email. Please try again or contact our support team for assistance.
errors.PASSWORD_CHANGE_REQUEST_ERROR: An error occurred while sending the email.
errors.PAYMENT_EXECUTE_ERROR: There was an error while executing the payment.
errors.PAYMENT_PROCESSING_ERROR: Failed to process payment. Please try again.
errors.TOO_MANY_REQUESTS_ERROR: Too many requests. Please try again later.
errors.UNIQUE_ERROR: Email is used by other user.
errors.VOUCHER_NOT_APPLICABLE_ERROR: Promo code is not applicable to this checkout.
errors.VENDOR_MISMATCH_ERROR: Some items in your bag can't be purchased together due to vendor restrictions.
errors.VENDOR_MIX_NOT_ALLOWED_ERROR: You can only buy products from one vendor at a time. Please adjust your bag and try again.

auth.newEmail: Email is used by other user.
auth.newEmailAddressMustBeDifferent: The new email address must be different from your current one.

account.deleteAccount: There was an error while sending the email.

stock-errors.products-unavailable: Sorry, the products you want to buy are unavailable
stock-errors.products-message: Products you’ve wanted to buy are unavailable for your shipping location or they’re out of stock. Contact us for more info.
stock-errors.some-of-products-unavailable: Sorry, some of the products are unavailable
stock-errors.some-of-products-message: The product you’ve wanted to buy is unavailable for your shipping location or it’s out of stock. Contact us for more info.

auth.sign-in-error: Sorry, wrong email or password. Please try again.
auth.create-account-agreement: By clicking “Create account” you agree with <termsOfUse>{termsOfUse}</termsOfUse> and <privacyPolicy>{privacyPolicy}</privacyPolicy> of Nimara Store
auth.create-account-verify: Your account needs to be verified first. Check your email and click activation link to activate your account.
auth.confirm-account-fail: An error occurred while confirming your account.
auth.confirm-account-success: Great! Your account is now active.
auth.reset-password-description: Please type the email address used to create the account you'd like to access.
auth.reset-password-link-sent-description: If the account with the email address you've provided exists, you'll receive the message with a password reset link.
auth.set-up-new-password-error: Couldn't set up a new password.
auth.set-up-new-password-success: You can now log in using your new password.
auth.by-creating-account: By creating an account, you can track your orders more effectively and save your addresses and payment methods.
auth.you-wont-have-access: You won't have access to your order history or any special deals we've got for you.

account.you-need-to-confirm-your-new-email: You need to confirm your new email
account.confirm-new-email-description: We've sent you the confirmation link to your new email. The link will be active for next {timeRemaining} hours.
account.confirm-new-email-button: Ok, I'll confirm my new email
account.delete-account-and-all-your-data-permane: Delete account and all your data permanently
account.delete-account-description: After deleting your account, all your data and other account details will no longer be stored in Nimara Store.
account.delete-account-modal-description: Once you delete the account all your saved and personal data will be no longer stored in Nimara Store.
account.in-case-of-any-questions: In case of any questions, <contactUs>{contactUs}</contactUs> or read our <privacyPolicy>{privacyPolicy}</privacyPolicy>.
account.i-want-permanently-delete-my-account-and: I want to permanently delete my account and all data from Nimara Store
account.confirm-account-deletion-description: You will receive an email message with a link confirming the deletion of your account.
account.your-account-has-been-permanently-delete: Your account has been permanently deleted
account.payment-method-delete-info: Are you sure you want to delete this payment method? You won’t be able to undo this action.

order.sorry-you-dont-have-any-orders: Sorry, you don’t have any orders yet.
order.return-request-submitted: Thank you! Your return request has been successfully submitted

footer.demo-version: <link>This is the demo version of Nimara Store.</link>

newsletter.email-required-newsletter: Email is required to subscribe to the newsletter.
newsletter.subscribe-description: Subscribe to our newsletter and be the first to get updates on new products and promotions.
newsletter.subscribe-error: An error occurred while subscribing to the newsletter. Please try again.
newsletter.subscribe-success: You have successfully subscribed to the newsletter.

general.heading: General
general.account-updated-desc: Account information has been updated successfully.

addresses.empty-state: No addresses found. Add your first address to get started.

channel-availability.no-channels-selected-product: No channels selected. Click 'Manage' to select channels for this product.
channel-availability.no-channels-selected-collection: No channels selected. Click 'Manage' to select channels for this collection.
channel-availability.option-no-product-type: This option will be changed based on the product type.
channel-availability.option-has-variants: You will be able to define availability of product after creating variants.
channel-availability.hide-in-listings-description: Enabling this checkbox will remove product from search and category pages. It will be available on collection pages.
channel-availability.published-description-visible: Visible via public API. Customers can find and view this product.
channel-availability.published-description-hidden: Hidden from public API. Customers cannot find or view this product.
channel-availability.available-for-purchase-on: Product can be added to cart and purchased.
channel-availability.available-for-purchase-off: Visible but not purchasable. Customers can view this product but cannot add it to cart.
channel-availability.show-in-listings-on: Visible in search and category pages.
channel-availability.show-in-listings-off: Hidden from browsing. Customers can still access it via direct link.
channel-availability.no-variant-listed: No variant listed in this channel
channel-availability.no-variant-price: No variant has a price in "{channelName}"
channel-availability.manage-modal-description-collection: Select which channels to configure for this collection. Only selected channels will appear in the Availability section.
channel-availability.manage-modal-description-product: Select which channels to configure for this product. Only selected channels will appear in the Availability section.

auth.no-account-cta: Don't have an account? Sign up here. →
auth.sign-up-description: Enter your details to create a vendor account.

auth.already-have-account-cta: Already have an account? Sign In here. →
auth.error-throttled: Environment has been throttled. Try again in a moment
auth.error-account-not-active: Your account is not yet active.
auth.validation-email-invalid: Please enter a valid email address
auth.validation-password-min: Password must be at least 8 characters

pages.account-confirm-loading-description: Please wait while we verify your email address...
pages.account-confirm-success-description: Your email has been verified. You can now sign in to your account.
pages.account-confirm-error-invalid-link: Invalid confirmation link. Please request a new one.
pages.account-confirm-error-account-failed: Account confirmation failed. Please try again.
pages.account-confirm-error-support: If you continue to have issues, please contact support.

vendors.open-from-dashboard: Open the app from Saleor dashboard to view vendor profiles.
